meta.intent: Force first-clear priority between the lower puppy that is near the coming water and the upper-right puppy that looks cleaner to rescue.
meta.expectedPath: Rescue the lower puppy first even though the upper-right puppy looks more open, then pivot across the board to finish the safer rescue.
meta.expectedFailMode: The player saves the easier upper-right puppy first, spends too many actions away from the lower route, and lets the first water rise catch the lower puppy's row.
meta.whatItProves: By Level 3, rescue order is the puzzle.
meta.notes: This level intentionally uses a tight 3-action water interval as the first rescue-order pressure spike: lower-first is fair, but upper-first spends too much of the opening water budget before the urgent route is safe.
